item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response correctly treats the prompt as metric trend and sales-path consolidation judgment, not as an N+1 local repair or triage trigger.
